items.title: Pickle360 Game
items.desc: Pickleball energy, anywhere you can stand — no court required. Pickle 360 takes everything fun about pickleball and frees it from the court. It's a fast, 2-on-2 game built around a portable net target: grab a paddle, get three hits to set up your spike, and smash it home. Set up in minutes on the lawn, the beach, the driveway, or the gym floor, pack it back in its case, and bring the action wherever the family goes. How it plays: Action-packed 2-on-2 — three hits to spike or smash it into the net Play literally anywhere — grass, sand, hard court, or indoors on gym floors Sturdy weighted target — robust legs with rubber feet keep it planted Sets up in minutes — no court lines, no net poles, no setup headache Includes a travel case — fold it up and take it on the road Ages 13+ — easy for newcomers, addictive for pickleball diehards Spike it in the backyard, the park, or the sand. All the pickleball thrill, none of the court.

items.title: Lifetime Smoker/Grill Combo
items.desc: Impress your family and friends with delicious food without the hassle of becoming a pitmaster. Explore a new world of flavors and make great food with the Lifetime Gas Grill and Pellet Smoker. Whether you are in the mood for grilling burgers or smoking brisket, this single unit is capable of doing both. Smoking lets you customize your flavor more precisely while gas grilling lets you form a flavorful and appealing crust. Save space around your home with the stacked grill and smoker design instead of having two separate units. Easily monitor your temperature anywhere with the app and even adjust the temperature through Bluetooth® or Wi-Fi. Make an effortless meal that will be a hit with your family and friends using the Lifetime Gas Grill and Pellet Smoker. Feature Points - • Combination gas grill and pellet smoker • 742 square inches of enamel-coated grilling racks • Super-efficient 32,000 BTU burner system • 180°F–700°F temperature range • Gas-assisted ignition for cold weather performance • App-enabled temperature control and monitoring • Fusion Fuel™ dual cooking technology • Large LCD control display • 20 lb pellet hopper with quick-exchange and easy clean-out • Built-in propane tank holder and storage cabinet Features and Benefits - ﻿• Combination gas grill and pellet smoker – Offers the flexibility to grill with gas, smoke with pellets, or combine both for premium flavor and performance. • 742 square inches of enamel-coated grilling racks – Provides ample cooking space to fit up to 24 hamburger patties at once, ideal for backyard gatherings. • Super-efficient 32,000 BTU burner system – Delivers powerful, consistent heat for fast, effective grilling. • 180°F–700°F temperature range – Wide heat range supports everything from low-and-slow smoking to high-heat searing. • Gas-assisted ignition for cold weather performance – Ensures reliable startup even in chilly conditions, so you can grill year-round. • App-enabled temperature control and monitor – Lets you set, monitor, and adjust cooking temps directly from your smartphone for hands-off convenience. • Fusion Fuel™ dual cooking technology – Stacked design lets you smoke and grill in a single space-saving unit. • Large LCD control display – Bright, easy-to-read interface provides real-time updates and control over cooking functions. • 20 lb pellet hopper with quick-exchange and easy clean-out – Simplifies fuel swaps and maintenance for seamless operation. • Built-in propane tank holder and storage cabinet – Keeps grilling essentials organized and within reach for a tidy, efficient workspace.

items.title: The Ultimate Dove Hunting Experience

Pick your destination — Argentina or Uruguay — and spend five days in the field where the action never stops: thousands of doves on the wing, endless skies, and high-volume shooting that tests every ounce of skill and stamina. Then trade the field for the firelight — a premier lodge, chef-prepared dinners, regional wine, and the kind of camaraderie that only comes after a day like that. An experience for two, built so every detail is handled. What's included for two: 5 nights at a premier lodge in Argentina or Uruguay 5 days of high-volume dove hunting — up to 9 total hunts Professional field guides and daily gun cleaning Hunting licenses included All meals & beverages — alcoholic and non-alcoholic Daily laundry service and field transfers Roundtrip airport transfers Winspire booking & concierge service — a full-service travel team handles every reservation Good to know: Excludes gun rental, shotgun shells, airfare, and gratuities for guides and staff Hunters must be 15 or older Book within one year of purchase; travel within two years Reservations subject to availability and blackout dates (major holidays and local events); book 60 days ahead Dawn over the open fields, wings cutting through the gold light, and a glass of wine by the fire to close it out. Once in a lifetime — and it's yours for two.

items.title: CMA Fest 2027: The Ultimate Country Music Weekend
items.desc: Every summer, Nashville doesn’t just host CMA Fest — it becomes CMA Fest. The city pulses with the rhythm of guitars and fiddles, every street corner alive with music, every block buzzing with fans who’ve traveled from around the world. From sunrise strums to midnight encores, it’s an unbroken celebration of country music’s past, present, and future. Lower-Level Stadium Passes (Thurs & Fri), Fan Fair X Access, and 3-Night Stay in Downtown Nashville for 2 This Experience for 2 Includes: ● Lower Level (100s) stadium passes to CMA Fest at Nissan Stadium for Thursday, June 3, 2027, and Friday, June 4, 2027 ● Fan Fair X admission for both Thursday and Friday — meet & greets, acoustic sets, interviews, exclusive merch, and air-conditioned comfort inside Music City Center ● Access to all CMA Fest indoor and outdoor stages — 200+ artists across downtown Nashville’s daytime and nighttime shows ● 3-night stay (Wednesday - Saturday) in a standard guest room at a downtown Nashville hotel ● Winspire booking & concierge service — seamless support for every detail, from securing passes to sharing local recommendations The Legacy of CMA Fest As the longest-running country music festival, CMA Fest is more than a weekend — it’s a tradition. Four days where Nashville turns into the beating heart of the genre, filled with nonstop performances, unforgettable fan moments, and stories waiting to be told. Nissan Stadium: Where Legends Play With lower-level passes for Thursday and Friday, you’ll step into the electric glow of Nissan Stadium — the big stage where country’s brightest stars deliver career-defining performances. Every night is packed with showstopping sets, surprise collaborations, and the kind of magic that only happens once a year, under the stadium lights. Fan Fair X: Up Close and Personal Inside the Music City Center, Fan Fair X pulls you behind the curtain of country music. Step into cool air conditioning and warmer connections — intimate acoustic sets, candid artist interviews, and exclusive meet & greets that bring fans face-to-face with both icons and rising stars. It’s country music at its most personal. Seating and sessions are first come, first served, but with hundreds of performances and experiences citywide, the music never stops. Stay in the Heart of Music City For three nights, your home is downtown Nashville, surrounded by the city’s most legendary spots. Step outside and you’re on Broadway, where neon lights blaze and honky-tonks spill live music into the streets. Savor authentic barbecue, take in the historic Ryman, and let the nightlife carry you long after the stadium shows end. Nashville doesn’t go quiet – it keeps singing, just for you. WINSPIRE PACKAGE REDEMPTION: This package is date specific. If the event were to be canceled or held without spectators, it would be honored for the following year. WINSPIRE BOOKING & CONCIERGE SERVICES:Winspire provides a team of seasoned travel professionals to help you redeem your experience. We will book all travel-related details and reservations for every part of your experience. Included within our services, Winspire can assist with extra hotel nights, airfare, and additional guests as a full-service travel agency. ADDITIONAL INFORMATION: Reservations must be booked 60 days in advance of travel. Purchases through charity fundraisers are non-refundable. Certificates cannot be resold or replaced if lost, stolen, or destroyed. Ground transportation is the responsibility of the winner unless otherwise stated.

items.title: 3D Printer - FLASHFORGE Adventurer
items.desc: Experience hassle-free 3D printing with the Adventurer 5M Series. Enjoy automatic bed leveling for flawless first layers, ensuring consistent adhesion and saving time with no manual adjustments required. Featuring a CoreXY structure with 600mm/s travel speed and 20000mm/s² acceleration, the AD5M maximizes efficiency, reduces production cycles, and ensures high precision, making it ideal for rapid prototyping and mass production. Quick 3-second nozzle changes, a high-flow 32mm³/s nozzle, and fast 35-second warm-up to 200°C deliver stable high-speed printing. Its dual-sided PEI platform and versatile options provide easy removal and adaptability for various creative projects. With dual-fan nozzles, vibration compensation, multiple nozzle sizes (0.25-0.8mm), and a 280°C direct extruder, the AD5M ensures top-tier print quality. Use the Flash Maker mobile app for real-time monitoring and intelligent operation, making your printing experience seamless.
